enabled.description: Enable or disable Amazon Polly TTS.

voice.description: Default Polly voice ID. Generative: Ruth, Matthew, Stephen. Neural: Joanna, Lupe, Amy, Brian.

engine.description: Polly engine type. Generative is highest quality, neural is fastest, standard is cheapest.

region.description: AWS region for Polly API calls.

enabled.description: Enable or disable Amazon Transcribe STT.

region.description: AWS region for Transcribe Streaming API calls.

enabled.description: Enable or disable Amazon Nova Sonic realtime voice.

model.description: Bedrock model ID for Nova Sonic.

region.description: AWS region. Nova Sonic currently only available in us-east-1.

polly.label: Amazon Polly (TTS)
polly.help: Text-to-speech via Amazon Polly. Uses IAM credential chain — no API key needed.

polly.enabled.label: Enabled
polly.enabled.help: Enable or disable Amazon Polly TTS.

polly.voice.label: Voice
polly.voice.help: Polly voice ID. Generative voices (Ruth, Matthew, Stephen) for best quality. Full list: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/polly/latest/dg/voicelist.html

polly.engine.label: Engine
polly.engine.help: Generative: most natural (~$30/1M chars). Neural: fast (~$16/1M chars). Standard: cheapest (~$4/1M chars). Long-form: optimized for articles.

polly.region.label: AWS Region
polly.region.help: Region for Polly API calls. Note: generative engine is only available in us-east-1 and eu-west-1.

polly.languageCode.label: Language Code
polly.languageCode.help: BCP-47 language code. Required for bilingual voices.

polly.sampleRate.label: Sample Rate
polly.sampleRate.help: 24000 Hz for generative/long-form. Standard/neural only accept 8000, 16000, or 22050.

transcribe.label: Amazon Transcribe (STT)
transcribe.help: Speech-to-text via Amazon Transcribe Streaming. Uses IAM credential chain — no API key needed.

transcribe.enabled.label: Enabled
transcribe.enabled.help: Enable or disable Amazon Transcribe STT.

transcribe.region.label: AWS Region
transcribe.region.help: Region for Transcribe Streaming API calls.

transcribe.languageCode.label: Language Code
transcribe.languageCode.help: Default language for transcription. Can be overridden per request.

novaSonic.label: Amazon Nova Sonic (Realtime Voice)
novaSonic.help: Bidirectional speech-to-speech via Nova Sonic on Bedrock. Full-duplex voice conversations with tool calling.

novaSonic.enabled.label: Enabled
novaSonic.enabled.help: Enable or disable Nova Sonic realtime voice.

novaSonic.voice.label: Voice
novaSonic.voice.help: Nova Sonic voice ID. Available: tiffany, matthew, amy.

novaSonic.region.label: AWS Region
novaSonic.region.help: Region for Bedrock API calls. Nova Sonic currently available in us-east-1.
